variant_description: High-throughput clinical variant with 480-540 slide capacity, fully automated loading, AI tissue detection, multi-rack compatibility, and safety container for QC-flagged slides. Represented by the 3DHISTECH P480, Aperio GT 450, and Agilent S540MD. Serves Scenarios 1, 3, and 4 primarily. Target technology not yet committed — natural candidates include simio, anylogic, or flexsim for production-grade models.

Medium-throughput research variant with 60-120 slide capacity, slower cycle, simpler QC. Represented by NanoZoomer and Motic EasyScan Infinity class scanners. Serves Scenarios 1 and 2 for smaller labs. Target technology not yet committed.

Multi-scanner lab variant modeling N scanners of mixed capability with LIS-driven routing and fleet utilization optimization. Serves Scenario 4 primarily (Multi-Scanner Load Balancing). Target technology not yet committed.

End-to-end lab variant that includes upstream embedding, cutting, and staining stages, so the scanner sits within a fuller process model. Serves Scenario 2 primarily (Upstream Workflow Integration). Target technology not yet committed.
